news.paragraph: Silver is trading near recent highs as traders assess the potential impact of a new Iran deal and ongoing inflation concerns on precious metals. The market is digesting mixed signals, with geopolitical tensions potentially boosting safe-haven demand while inflation data could influence central bank policy.

headlines.title: Gold Inches Up as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, Inflation
